productDisplayName: Aspen Women White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Whether or not you make it to the slopes this year, this timepiece from aspen captures the spirit and beauty of a mountain side covered in pristine snow. Luxury watchmakers Aspen have used the most precise technology and the most exquisite materials to create stylish watches perfect for the sophisticated you. Case diameter : 25 mm Case thickness : 5 mm Dial shape : Round Warranty : Two Years Stainless steel round case with a gold coloured bezel Two toned steel and gold coloured strap with a butterfly clasp Mother of pearl dial with gold coloured hands Two chronographic displays Branding at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering.
